title: Mass crackdown in Saudi Arabia: Over 14,000 illegal residents arrested in one week
summary_full: Saudi Arabia's security forces have arrested over 14,000 individuals in a nationwide crackdown on illegal residents. The operation targeted violations of residency, labour, and border laws. Thousands are being deported, while others face legal procedures. Authorities are also penalizing those who aid undocumented individuals. The public is urged to report violations.
